headline: RadNet Makes $270 Million Bet On AI Future With Gleamer Buyout
summary: RadNet (RDNT) reports record Q4 revenue and adjusted EBITDA, beating estimates and announcing acquisition of Paris-based AI firm Gleamer.

headline: Assessing GE HealthCare Technologies (GEHC) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: GE HealthCare Technologies (GEHC) is back on the radar for many investors after recent share price moves, with the stock closing at $84.27 as short term returns and fundamental metrics draw closer attention. See our latest analysis for GE HealthCare Technologies. The recent 6.7% 1 month share price return and 6.4% 3 month share price return suggest improving momentum around GE HealthCare Technologies, although the 1 year total shareholder return of a 3.4% decline shows the longer term picture...
